decisions.briefing: Markets are mildly positive today with both NASDAQ and S&P 500 up 0.3%, a neutral but non-threatening backdrop. I opened three positions in the highest-scored stocks (all 95) with RSI readings in the ideal 55-70 bullish momentum zone — avoiding overbought names like NVDA, AMD, and GOOGL. Each position is sized at or below 25% of the portfolio, with stop-losses at -7% and profit targets at +12% protecting downside while targeting the 15% overall goal.
